mismatch_triage.justification: 2d plan-view with multilayer thermodynamics is incompatible with 3d.
Both submodels share identical timestep, grid; two-way exchange each coupling interval; flux variables are directly compatible in units, meaning.

A→AB:0.24 (covered: freshwater, heat, momentum, opa, state, two) | B→AB:0.16 (covered: interactions, lim, ogcm, state) | A∪B→AB:0.36 (covered: freshwater, heat, interactions, lim, momentum, ogcm, opa, state, two)
A and B versions are similar enough for integration.
Both models cover polar regions, making them compatible.
A→AB:0.05 (covered: lim) | B→AB:0.05 (covered: opa) | A∪B→AB:0.10 (covered: lim, opa)
Coupled every few ocean steps, diagnostics monthly / daily is incompatible with 96 min timestep in study.

mismatches.root_cause: Incompatible dimensionality between 2d plan-view with multilayer thermodynamics and 3d.
mismatches.why_it_blocks_integration: The models operate in different dimensions, making direct integration impossible.
mismatches.proposed_fix: Resample or interpolate one of the models to match the dimensionality of the other.

rules: Resample or interpolate 3d data to 2d plan-view with multilayer thermodynamics.
data_transform.example: Use interpolation techniques to convert 3d data to 2d.

steps: Convert 3d data to 2d plan-view with multilayer thermodynamics.

validation: Verify the resampled data matches the expected dimensionality.

mismatches.root_cause: Incompatible temporal resolution between coupled every few ocean steps, diagnostics monthly / daily and 96 min timestep in study.

evidence.A_value: coupled every few ocean steps, diagnostics monthly / daily

mismatches.why_it_blocks_integration: The models operate at different temporal resolutions, making direct integration impossible.
mismatches.proposed_fix: Resample or interpolate one of the models to match the temporal resolution of the other.

rules: Resample or interpolate 96 min timestep data to coupled every few ocean steps, diagnostics monthly / daily.
data_transform.example: Use interpolation techniques to convert 96 min timestep data to coupled every few ocean steps, diagnostics monthly / daily.

steps: Convert 96 min timestep data to coupled every few ocean steps, diagnostics monthly / daily.

validation: Verify the resampled data matches the expected temporal resolution.
